items.title: What The Wall Street Journal Gets Wrong About The Talking Filibuster
items.description: The talking filibuster has been a tool in the Senate’s arsenal for 200 years. Returning to it could unlock the majesty of the institution.

items.title: Stop Another Major Medicaid Money-Laundering Scam Before It’s Too Late
items.description: States are abusing intergovernmental transfers at patients’ and taxpayers’ expense.

items.title: How Oklahomans Can Outsmart The Bureaucracy To Require Better History Instruction In Public Schools
items.description: Knowledge is not an optional decoration in a democracy. It is the raw material of self-government.

items.title: My Students Protesting ICE Cannot Answer One Question On The U.S. Citizenship Exam
items.description: It is time to restore education's core mission: knowledge first, civics always, activism never.

items.title: Trump Admin Fights To Keep Illegal Immigrants From Distorting Census
items.description: The Census Bureau recently announced its plan to administer a survey that includes the query 'Is this person a citizen of the United States?'
